name: feature-builder
description: Phase 4 (Implementation) agentic worker for ScenarioForge. Picks ready features from features.json and builds each into working code against the ASP.NET Core 8 MVC + EF Core + DDD stack, looping build -> fix until green. Acts as a per-feature dispatcher: routes hard / cross-page / security-sensitive features to an Opus subagent and clusters of simple, similar features to an Opus-built exemplar + Sonnet replicas, to cut cost without losing quality. Runs an 8-step verification pipeline (build, design compliance, CRUD, API integration, test coverage, tech audit, config, and Scenario Trace Check) plus a UI Control Manifest gate on every feature regardless of model, and writes traces_down.features back to the scenario spine. Resumable across sessions via a progress ledger; circuit-breaker bounded with Sonnet->Opus escalation. (Renamed from long-running.)
